message:
fix(fcp-e2e): fix happy path tests with wiremock mocks and introspection

All 37 batch-2 E2E compliance tests had two issues:
1. Happy path tests used ComplianceSuite without wiremock mocks, causing
   404 errors when the connector tried to call the mock server
2. Adapter introspect() returned empty operations, failing ConnectorSuite's
   operation_count verification

Fixed by:
- Switching happy path tests to ConnectorSuite with proper wiremock Mock
  mounted for each connector's actual API path
- Populating introspect() with at least one OperationInfo per adapter
- Adding missing imports (AgentHint, RiskLevel, SafetyTier, etc.)

Also fixed 6 batch-1 tests (twilio, s3, llm_router, jira, figma, evernote)
that had the same introspection issue.

All 79 E2E compliance test files (237 tests) now pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
